title: Changing Legend of Stacked Bar Chart
excerpt: Based on this chart, it is shown that 1=Won and Blank=Lost. For example, KC Wang Won 2 proposals and Lost 3 out of 5 proposals. I want to Change the legend at the bottom. Blue (originally 1) to Won and Yellow (origina…

posts.author: Alammulia1 (Alammulia1)
posts.cookedHtml:
Screenshot 2024-01-26 at 4.08.05 PM2208×842 109 KB

Based on this chart, it is shown that 1=Won and Blank=Lost. For example, KC Wang Won 2 proposals and Lost 3 out of 5 proposals. I want to Change the legend at the bottom. Blue (originally 1) to Won and Yellow (originally Blank) to Lost

posts.author: CharlotteK (Charlotte Kirkham)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey there!

What columns are you using in this chart? Could you attach a screenshot of the settings?

This will help us understand the column types and how to fix it. For example, if the blue and yellow are coming from status columns, you will need to rename the status labels to reflect won and lost to fix this.

posts.author: Alammulia1 (Alammulia1)
posts.cookedHtml:
Screenshot 2024-01-29 at 10.24.03 AM710×574 66.1 KB

Screenshot 2024-01-29 at 10.24.13 AM698×680 76.7 KB

Screenshot 2024-01-29 at 10.24.26 AM678×718 83.8 KB

These are the columns I am using. I suppose the name used, (1 and Blank) are extracted from the column of Deal Created? I have tried to create a column showing Won/Loss. However, it doesn’t seem to be working on the chart. Could you please assist on it? Thank You.
